questions.enonce: Which modal verb is best for giving a strong suggestion for the environment?
options: You should recycle your plastic bottles
You musting recycle your plastic bottles
You coulding recycle your plastic bottles
You shall recycle your plastic bottles

questions.enonce: 'Could' is used for a possible but less certain suggestion.
We {{1}} to stop using so much plastic. (Necessity/Advice)

questions.question: Match the modal with its role in advice.

pairs.right: A very polite or hypothetical suggestion
